title: fagara ailanthoides
intro: Fagara ailanthoides, also known as Chinese prickly ash, is a type of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Fagara ailanthoides include its ability to relieve pain, reduce fever, and improve digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Fagara ailanthoides can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make tonics, pills, and powders.
